title: TNEA Cutoff Marks 100-120: List of Colleges (Highest to Lowest)

detail.title: TNEA Cutoff Marks 100-120: List of Colleges (Highest to Lowest)
detail.short_info: TNEA Engineering Colleges for Cutoff Marks Between 100 to 120 in Tamil Nadu: Check list of 100+ private colleges, average cutoffs, counselling process, and branch options for 2026 admissions.

content.text: Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA) is the single-window counselling process for B.E/B.Tech admissions in Tamil Nadu. Candidates scoring between 100 to 120 marks (out of 200 scaled score) in TNEA have realistic chances in many private self-financing engineering colleges. Around 100+ colleges accept students in this range. This article provides a complete list of colleges, average cutoffs, counselling process, branch-wise options, and expert tips to help you make the best choice.

rows: ECE, Mechanical, Civil, EEE, IT, CSE (limited)
Students with average to good board marks

sections.heading: TNEA Cutoff Marks 100-120: List of Colleges (Highest to Lowest)

items: Online Registration — Fill application on tneaonline.org
Good Chances: Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, EEE, Automobile, Biotechnology
Moderate Chances: ECE, IT (in lower-tier colleges)
Limited Chances: CSE (only in few colleges)
Prioritize college reputation and placement record over branch
Keep management quota as backup option
